title: 22mm Compression Equal Elbow - Bag of 2
features: This listing is for a Pack of 2
For joining two 22mm copper or plastic plumbing pipes in a 90 degree elbow arrangement (pipe inserts are required when using to connect plastic pipe)
Seal is formed with the olive and not the thread so PTFE is not recommended as it can reduce the compression capabilities of the thread.
description: Brass Compression Equal Elbow - 22mm. Introducing the Brass Equal Elbow - 22mm. Elbows are essential in plumbing setups, providing a bend when needed during installation. These brass compression fittings offer a heat-free mechanical joint, connecting copper pipes securely. Compression fittings consist of components like a compression nut and olive. As you tighten the nut onto the pipe, the olive compresses against the pipe, ensuring a watertight seal. No flames or solders are needed; just use a spanner for fitting. These elbows are suitable for both low and high-pressure water systems, as well as gas and oil applications.Technical Specifications: Compression Equal Elbow Compact Design Material: Brass WRAS Approved Kite Marked: Yes For Water/Gas Easy to Use Maximum Pressure: 16 Size: 22mm ;
